name: Rain Window
description: Rain against window panes with cozy indoor warmth

prompts.SessionStart: rain droplet percussion ascending with bright rhythmic water tone, rain drop bell, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SessionEnd: rain droplet descending with smooth rhythmic water decay, rain drop bell, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.Stop: single bright rain droplet with satisfying water bell ring, rain drop tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct rain drop tick with crisp water percussion click, rain tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PostToolUse: short rain drop chirp confirming with bright water percussion ping, rain tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two rain drop tones with questioning rising water percussion interval, rain bell, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady rain drop pulse with clear rhythmic water percussion, rain tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStart: rain drops splitting into two diverging water percussion voices, rain sound, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStop: clear rain drop ping returning with distinct water bell ring, rain tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic rain drop burst with rapid water percussion attack, rain bell tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
